title: Tesla Charge State Structure
description: JSON structure documentation for Tesla vehicle battery and charging state

fields.name: battery_level
fields.description: Current battery charge as a percentage (0-100)

fields.name: battery_range
fields.description: Estimated range in miles at current charge level

fields.name: charge_current_request
fields.description: Requested charging current in amperes

fields.name: charge_enable_request
fields.description: Whether charging is requested to be enabled

fields.name: charge_limit_soc
fields.description: State-of-charge percentage at which charging will stop

fields.name: charge_limit_soc_max
fields.description: Maximum allowed charge limit percentage

fields.name: charge_limit_soc_min
fields.description: Minimum allowed charge limit percentage

fields.name: charge_miles_added_ideal
fields.description: Ideal miles of range added in current session

fields.name: charge_miles_added_rated
fields.description: Rated miles of range added in current session

fields.name: charge_port_door_open
fields.description: Whether the charge port door is open

fields.name: charge_port_latch
fields.description: State of the charge port latch (Engaged, Disengaged)

fields.name: charge_rate
fields.description: Current charging rate in miles per hour

fields.name: charge_to_max_range
fields.description: Whether charging to maximum range is enabled

fields.name: charger_actual_current
fields.description: Actual charging current in amperes

fields.name: charger_phases
fields.description: Number of electrical phases used for charging

fields.name: charger_pilot_current
fields.description: Pilot current limit from the charger in amperes

fields.name: charger_power
fields.description: Current charger power in kW

fields.name: charger_voltage
fields.description: Charging voltage in volts

fields.name: charging_state
fields.description: Current charging state (Charging, Complete, Disconnected, Stopped, NoPower)

fields.name: conn_charge_cable
fields.description: Type of charging cable connected (e.g., SAE J1772, Combo)

fields.name: est_battery_range
fields.description: Estimated remaining battery range in miles

fields.name: fast_charger_brand
fields.description: Brand of fast charger connected (e.g., Tesla, Other)

fields.name: fast_charger_present
fields.description: Whether a DC fast charger (Supercharger) is connected

fields.name: fast_charger_type
fields.description: Type of fast charger (e.g., Tesla, CCS, CHAdeMO)

fields.name: minutes_to_full_charge
fields.description: Estimated minutes until charging completes

fields.name: usable_battery_level
fields.description: Usable battery level as a percentage
